## What does this PR do?
<!-- One sentence: what skill is added/changed and why -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill uses plain language (no developer jargon)
- [ ] Description includes natural trigger phrases ("Use when...")
- [ ] Skill has Examples section
- [ ] Skill has Troubleshooting section
- [ ] Skill has Related Skills section
- [ ] Tested the skill in Cowork and confirmed it produces useful output
- [ ] No changes to unrelated skills

<!-- What role/profession benefits from this change? -->
